case_title: WHOVILLE, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP vs. HADFIELD, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHOVILLE, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED JUL-01-1998, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HADFIELD, RICHARD
